candidate_archival_state.archival_reason: REJECT_FAST at P6.5 driven by DR10 turnover_cost_explosion (canonical annual_turnover>0.50 branch)

favorable_economics_recorded_but_not_ove.important_note: These favorable readings DO NOT change the verdict. The strategy is profitable at every cost-stress tier and clears K9 trade count, but the SEAL's DR10 turnover-cost-explosion rule is unambiguous and is the binding precedence ahead of A-gates/K-gates.
favorable_economics_recorded_but_not_ove.summary: REJECT_FAST is binding under DR10's canonical letter regardless of these favorable IS economics. Per SEAL: fail_safety_outcomes_terminal_for_this_candidate_record_id=True; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal=True. Numbers below are RECORD-ONLY, NOT money-proven, NOT live-ready, NOT promotable.

lessons_eligible_for_lessons_md_in_a_sep: LESSON_S13_D1_001 (eligible; NOT written this turn): DR10 turnover>0.50 branch is intrinsic to high-frequency RSI(2) bi-directional and analogous mean-reversion families; mitigation via DA4 capital-base scaling addresses the cost_drag branch but not the turnover branch.

LESSON_S13_D1_002 (eligible; NOT written this turn): A REJECT_FAST verdict at P6.5 is binding even when (a) IS K9 clears, (b) all A-gates pass, (c) all cost-stress tiers stay edge-positive, and (d) no other DR fires. The DR precedence chain is upstream of K-gates and A-gates by SEAL design.

LESSON_S13_D1_003 (eligible; NOT written this turn): Future high-frequency candidates in this framework must either (i) lower trade frequency below 0.50 annual_turnover-equivalent (structural redesign, not a SEAL relaxation), or (ii) propose a framework-level DR10 revision via SEAL revision (NOT a post-SEAL re-interpretation), or (iii) accept that the family is structurally rejected.

WARNING (eligible; NOT written this turn): These lessons would be written to brain_memory/projects/trading_bot/lessons.md only under a separate explicit operator authorization ('Authorize s13-d1 P7 lessons.md update.' or similar). This P7 memo deliberately does NOT touch lessons.md.
what_this_outcome_demonstrates: DR10's annual_turnover>0.50 branch is structurally hostile to RSI(2) bi-directional (and any similar high-frequency mean-reversion family) at any practical capital base, because the turnover ratio is invariant under proportional capital+contract scaling.

DA4=C capital-base scaling mitigates the cost_drag branch of DR10 (as the SEAL intended) but cannot mitigate the turnover branch. Sealed DR10 is OR-disjunctive, so a mitigated cost_drag branch does not prevent firing when the turnover branch is satisfied.
The SEAL anticipated this: it labeled DR10 as ELEVATED prior probability for the RSI 50-65 trades/y family. The P6.5 result confirms the prior.

Per SEAL no_dr_redefinition_post_seal=True: the DR10 turnover threshold cannot be reinterpreted or relaxed post-SEAL. Treating positive-edge economics or K9-clearing as overriding a fail-closed DR is exactly the failure mode that LESSON_B006_002_002 captured (favorable numbers do not override fail-closed verdicts by design).
K9 trade-count clearance and positive A-gates are necessary but NOT sufficient for OOS progression: an upstream DR rule firing terminates the lifecycle at P7 ahead of K-gate/A-gate consideration.
what_this_outcome_does_NOT_demonstrate: The strategy lost money on IS (it did not; net PnL positive at every cost tier, including S4 at $79,058).
OOS K9 would have fired (REC1-equivalent indicated OOS K9 was reachable; the candidate did not reach P10).
The SEAL was wrong (the SEAL explicitly anticipated DR10 was ELEVATED for this family and applied DA4=C mitigation specifically to the cost_drag branch).
RSI(2) is fundamentally non-viable (it could be viable in a framework that does not gate on annual_turnover>0.50; under THIS framework with DR10 as locked, this family is structurally rejected).

inherited_constraints_block_VERBATIM_FRO: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable at lower bound with thin margin (~50-65 trades/year vs 50/year floor). If observed IS rate falls below 25/year on RSI(2) bi-directional, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable. The s9 RSI-2 baseline observed 414 trades over long-only 4-ETF window; if MNQ.c.0 bi-directional rate falls below half that proportional rate, OOS K9 fires. If OOS K9 fires, the OOS verdict shall be OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE analogous to S10-D2 P11 PARK at 23c7164 and s12-d1 P11 park at ecbd001. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS; the appropriate response is to seal the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / INDETERMINATE verdict and park the candidate. Pursuing s13-d1 accepts the structural possibility of an OOS PARK outcome if the IS rate falls below the DRAFT-estimated 50-65/y band.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); REVISED at SEAL from default 1.0% for DR3 mitigation
DA4=C (BINDING): START_CASH_USD = 200000 ($200k); REVISED at SEAL from default $100k for DR10 mitigation
K9-reachability discipline (NEW framework standard from 0e3f9d4) applied at PLAN+DRAFT+SEAL+P1+P2+P3+P4+P6; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family F3 RSI(2) bi-directional mean-reversion LOCKED at PLAN
RSI thresholds 10/50/90/50 LOCKED at PLAN; modification post-SEAL FORBIDDEN per RF13
DR3 risk ELEVATED (RSI lineage s9 falsification precedent); mitigated via DA3=B
DR10 risk ELEVATED (high-frequency turnover ~50-65 trades/y); mitigated via DA4=C ($200k START_CASH)
s12-d1 terminal park (PARKED_SAFE_BUT_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE_AT_IS at ecbd001) preserved unchanged
All parallel-session shorter-path sealed artifacts byte-stable; not anchored by this chain
Expected terminal verdict if OOS K9 fires: PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED
P6 PASS does NOT imply READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST at OOS
P6 PASS NEVER implies live-readiness; 6-gate live-block applies regardless of any verdict

non_drivers_recorded_for_audit.binding_evaluation_scope: DR3 + DR5 strictly at IS; DR2 provisional only; DR4 deferred

operator_decision_paths_post_p7.description: Honor the REJECT_FAST verdict as terminal. No further work on this candidate_record_id. No P10 OOS, no Strategy Lab, no FRC, no live. Catalog the candidate as ARCHIVED.
operator_decision_paths_post_p7.title: Park s13-d1 RSI(2) bi-directional permanently for this framework

operator_decision_paths_post_p7.description: Author a new SEAL for a candidate that targets annual_turnover < 0.50 by structural design (e.g., daily-bar swing rules, multi-bar holding periods, higher RSI entry thresholds, or a different mechanic family entirely). NOT a patch on s13-d1.
explicit_forbiddens: no parameter iteration to seek lower turnover under same SEAL
operator_decision_paths_post_p7.title: Start a fresh candidate with lower trade frequency

operator_decision_paths_post_p7.description: If the operator believes DR10's annual_turnover branch is mis-specified (e.g., should be benchmarked against cost_drag impact rather than raw turnover ratio), this requires a NEW SEAL turn that explicitly revises DR10's definition with a new threshold, justification, and audit trail. POST-SEAL re-interpretation of DR10 within s13-d1 is FORBIDDEN by no_dr_redefinition_post_seal=True.
explicit_forbiddens: no in-place modification of s13-d1 SEAL
operator_decision_paths_post_p7.title: Propose a framework-level DR10 revision via SEAL revision (NOT a re-interpretation)

operator_decision_paths_post_p7.description: Keep the P7 sealed memo on file; no Path A/B/C action initiated yet.
operator_decision_paths_post_p7.title: Defer / pause

report_kind: S13-D1 P7 decision memo: formalizes REJECT_FAST verdict driven by DR10 turnover_cost_explosion firing at P6.5 cost-stress (IS), notwithstanding favorable A-gate / K-gate outcomes and K9-clearing trade count, with C6 inherited_constraints_block carried verbatim and no_dr_redefinition_post_seal honored
title: s13-d1 P7 decision memo (sealed; binding; candidate-lifecycle TERMINAL by DR10 REJECT_FAST at P6.5)

verdict_drivers.mitigation_note: DA4=C $200k START_CASH structurally halves per-dollar cost-drag pressure (S2 cost_drag 2.35% < 5% threshold = mitigated). DA4=C does NOT reduce the annual_turnover ratio because contracts scale proportionally with equity; total_notional/start_cash is invariant under capital rescaling. The turnover branch is intrinsic to the RSI(2) bi-directional mechanic family at the observed 34.34 trades/y rate.
verdict_drivers.name: turnover_cost_explosion
verdict_drivers.precedence_chain_at_seal: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5
